name: Maui Chicken Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup prepared light Thousand Island dressing
1/2 cup jicama or water chestnuts, finely chopped
4 whole grain or whole sandwich rolls, split
red or green bell pepper, sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow, nonmetallic dish, combine undrained pineapple, crushed oregano, and garlic powder.
2. Add chicken to the dish and turn to coat all sides. Cover and marinate for 15 minutes in the refrigerator.
3. Remove from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
4. Grill or broil the chicken and pineapple, brushing with reserved marinade, for 5 to 8 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is no longer pink in the center and the pineapple is golden brown.
5. In a separate bowl, combine salad dressing, jicama, and ground red pepper (if using).
6. Spread the mixture onto the bottom halves of the rolls.
7. Place chicken, bell pepper rings, and pineapple on top of the spread. Add the top halves of the rolls.
8. Garnish with fresh fruit and mint leaves, if desired.
